{{Infobox concept
| name = Blood Shadow
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Blood Shadow Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A Blood [[Shadow]] is a spiritual parasite originating from the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. These entities function as hunger spirits that seek out hosts to consume their power, [[madra]], and [[essence]]. Once a host is drained, the Blood [[Shadow]] typically returns that stolen energy to the [[Phoenix]]. While many hosts are consumed and left as empty husks, some rare individuals manage to establish a symbiotic or controlled relationship with the entity. There are several ways a Blood [[Shadow]] can manifest and be managed. The most common method involves feeding the shadow [[blood madra]], resulting in a formless entity that acts as a controllable weapon. Another method involves feeding it actual blood, which allows the shadow to grow into monstrous or bestial forms, such as a [[dragon]] or a large predator. The most advanced form is a true Blood [[Shadow]], which acts as an absolute copy of the host—a second body that possesses its own will and powers, functioning as a perfectly coordinated partner in combat. [[Blood Shadows]] exhibit significant mutability, often taking on the physical traits, techniques, or even the bloodline abilities of what they consume. They can manifest in various shapes, including snakes, birds, [[spiders]], or humanoid copies of their hosts. Because they are highly intelligent and possess independent will, they can be difficult to restrain; if a host's willpower fails, the shadow may attempt to take over their body entirely. Additionally, [[Blood Shadows]] can produce bloodspawn, which are red, puppet-like constructs made of [[blood madra]] that serve as subordinates or hunters.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blood Shadow]] consumes everyone [[Yerin]] knows.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Blood [[Shadow]] is a spiritual parasite that [[Eithan]] slipped into the [[Skysworn]]. While it can be controlled by [[Yerin]] as a technique, it typically acts like an uncontrollable puppet or bloodspawn that seeks to drain its host dry to return power to the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. This entity, which feels like a liquid but leaves no residue on the skin, can contort into a humanoid shape or become a blood-clone of its host. During an encounter, the shadow grabbed [[Lindon]] by his collar and slammed him into a wall, though he was protected by a sheath of liquid yellow madra. Ultimately, the Blood [[Shadow]]'s fingertips are shaped by [[Yerin's sword]] [[madra]], and a red line can form between her and the shadow.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] feels like a liquid to the touch but leaves nothing on the skin.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]]'s fingertips are shaped by [[Yerin's sword]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] has awakened.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood Shadows]] are often puppets that cannot be controlled and act like bloodspawn.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The purpose of [[Blood Shadows]] is to feed their master.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Blood Shadow]] can be taken by [[sacred artists]] like pills to make them stronger.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Dreadgods]] give birth to a litter of [[Blood Shadows]] that act like [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood Shadows]] seek hosts to drain them dry and return power to the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] sensed the presence of the [[Blood Shadow]] inside [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a parasite inside [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Blood Shadow]] was slipped into the [[Skysworn]] by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] latched onto his arm, but a sheath of liquid yellow madra protected him.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a spiritual parasite that attempts to drain its host dry and wear them like a suit.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a spiritual parasite that can contort into a humanoid shape.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] can become a blood-clone of its host.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] grabbed [[Lindon]] by the collar and slammed him into a wall.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a technique or entity that [[Yerin]] can control.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Blood Shadow]] can form a red line between [[Yerin]] and the shadow.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A Blood [[Shadow]] is an internal power that resides within a person, though the [[Skysworn]] view them as potentially dangerous liabilities. While [[Yan Shoumei]] and [[Longhook]] both possess this ability, [[Yerin]]'s specific Blood [[Shadow]] appears as a red-tinted shadow that resembles a jagged, red-painted [[Remnant]] version of herself. This entity can fight independently or mimic its user's actions, such as when [[Longhook]]'s shadow follows his movements. [[Yerin]]'s version can be used as a cloak by a young woman, and it is capable of clinging to targets like a monkey to a tree by driving its clawed hands, thin blade-like arms, and Goldsigns into their bodies. Because the shadow can spread Goldsigns, it is a power that [[Yerin]] must learn to master despite her discomfort with the subject.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Blood Shadow]] is considered a potentially dangerous liability by the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A young woman used [[Blood Shadow]] as a cloak.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Blood Shadow]] looks like a [[Remnant]] version of [[Yerin]] with jagged angles and red paint.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Blood Shadow]] has two thin arms that flatten into blades.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] can cling to a target like a monkey to a tree, driving its clawed hands and Goldsigns into their body.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Blood Shadow]] can fight independently.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Blood Shadow]] is a power that resides inside a person.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]] possesses a [[Blood Shadow]] that can mimic his actions.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] can appear as a red-tinted shadow.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is something she is uncomfortable talking about.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Blood Shadow]] is something [[Yerin]] must get used to.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] can spread Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cultivated by the [[Sage of Red Faith]], the Blood [[Shadow]] is a parasitic spirit that acts as a mirror to its host and can be upgraded through the use of a [[Heaven's Drop]]. This entity, which possesses a nightmarish voice and the ability to speak, feeds on [[life]] [[aura]] and carries six-bladed Goldsigns. While it risks breaking away from its host if granted too much freedom, [[Yerin]]'s specific Blood [[Shadow]] is a powerful being that rose from her chest with red hands. This version of the shadow appears as a copy of [[Meira]], featuring pink skin, bright red hair, red irises, and crimson [[sacred artist]]'s robes. Equipped with six metallic red blades on its back and a pink-bladed copy of her master's sword, the entity has been known to growl in defiance.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] cultivated a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Blood Shadow]] can be upgraded using a [[Heaven's Drop]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a featureless red copy of [[Yerin]] with six red blades on its back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] can feed on [[life]] [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a parasitic spirit that can act as a mirror of its host.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]]'s Goldsigns are six-bladed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] can potentially break away from its host if allowed too much freedom.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] has a nightmarish voice.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] can speak.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is very strong and can speak.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a red-handed entity that rose from [[Yerin]]'s chest.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a copy of [[Meira]] with bright red hair and pink skin.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] has red irises and almost white eye whites.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] wears crimson [[sacred artist]]'s robes and has six metallic red blades on its back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Shadow]] uses a pink-bladed copy of [[Yerin's master]]'s [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] was growling in defiance.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] possesses an unrevealed ability known as the Blood [[Shadow]]. This entity functions as a parasite that accompanies her as a spirit. Appearing in various shades of crimson, the Blood [[Shadow]] acts as a spiritual copy of its user.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a parasite that acts as a copy of the user in shades of red.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] has an unrevealed ability called [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a spiritual copy of the user in shades of crimson.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a spirit that accompanies [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a parasite.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A Blood [[Shadow]] is a vicious, evil spirit that can manifest in human form and acts as a parasitic mass of [[blood madra]]. Related to the [[Phoenix]] and [[Monarch]] levels, this hungry entity can count as a second [[sacred artist]] in battle or attempt to possess a host's body. [[Yan Shoumei]] possessed a mysterious, monstrous Blood [[Shadow]] that clung to her like a cloak, while [[Yerin]]'s dormant version escaped her spirit and attacked [[Calan Archer]] with a black blade and [[ruby]] eyes. This specific entity, known as [[Ruby]], has not yet evolved a true human body but can re-form even if its head is destroyed. During training, [[Ruby]] practiced balancing a shimmering brick while blindfolded and demonstrated the ability to cycle [[aura]] under its own power.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Blood Shadow]] can count as a second [[sacred artist]] in battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] hung around her like a cloak.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood Shadow]] is a technique or advancement related to the [[Phoenix]] and [[Monarch]] levels.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] is described as monstrous and a mystery.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a mass of [[blood madra]] that acts as a parasite.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is hungry.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] escaped from [[Yerin's spirit]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] speaks in a broken voice.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a dormant entity inside [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] dashed after [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] used the [[Endless Sword]] and a black blade.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] has [[ruby]] eyes and bright red hair.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] tossed a red-tinged [[Rippling Sword]] at [[Calan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is an exception to the [[Frozen Blade]] technique's restriction.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] can steal power by killing or possessing others to bring it back to the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] licked its lips and patted its belly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a state of existence that can be improved for willpower training.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] would make surviving the [[Madra Engine]] for a year unlikely.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a spirit with red hair that uses no techniques and is being battered in the [[sword]] training area.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] was blindfolded and balanced a dark, shimmering brick in its lap.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] cycles [[aura]] under its own power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] uses a black [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|There are three methods for cultivating a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] uses a [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]]'s body can re-form after its head is destroyed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] is a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] is a [[Blood Shadow]] that has not yet evolved a true human body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was named her [[Blood Shadow]] well.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Blood Shadow]] is a type of spirit that can manifest a human form.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is considered evil and vicious.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is someone [[Ruby]] might return to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] can send power to her [[Blood Shadow]] using the [[Blood Sage]]'s technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Blood Shadow]] can attempt to take over a person's body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] merged with her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A tenth victim of [[Phoenix]] fragments can become a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Blood Shadow]] contains the power of the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The two [[Overlords]] carry weapons shrouded in [[Blood Shadows]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Blood Shadow]] can cover a [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A Blood [[Shadow]] is a symbiotic spirit that takes on the traits of whatever it consumes, appearing as a ring-shaped entity that beats in synchronization with its host's heart. This monstrous, blob-like entity can manifest in the sky or take the form of a snake, such as one belonging to an [[Archlady]]. When it feeds on a leviathan, the creature can turn the beast into a husk, though a raw [[Shadow]] from the [[Phoenix]] is noted to be easier to digest. These entities are associated with members of [[Redmoon Hall]] and can even be used as a technique to cover a weapon. Because of their nature, blatantly killing and feeding on another person's Blood [[Shadow]] is considered grounds for expulsion from a sect.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Blood Shadow]] can consume a leviathan and turn it into a husk.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a monstrous blob-like entity in the sky.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Archlady]] has a [[Blood Shadow]] in the form of a snake.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Blatantly killing and feeding on another's [[Blood Shadow]] is grounds for expulsion from the sect.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A raw [[Shadow]] from the [[Phoenix]] is easier to digest.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Blood Shadow]] is a ring-shaped entity that beats with the host's heart.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Blood Shadow]] is a symbiotic spirit that takes on the traits of whatever it feeds upon.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Blood Shadow]] is a technique or entity that can cover a weapon.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Blood Shadows]] are associated with [[Redmoon Hall]] members.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A Blood [[Shadow]] was observed melting away from a mace constructed of dark metal. This entity eventually became known as [[Ruby]], though it was later revealed that the Blood [[Shadow]] had killed [[Yerin]]'s family. The [[Remnant]] claimed responsibility for planting a Blood [[Shadow]], which possesses the ability to take the form of a [[sacred artist]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] eventually became [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Blood Shadow]] was melting away from a mace made of dark metal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Remnant]] claims to have planted a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Blood Shadow]] can take the form of a [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blood Shadow]] killed [[Yerin]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Blood [[Shadow]] is a technique capable of manifesting with its own independence and represents the primary source of power for [[Yan Shoumei]]. This entity is nestled within her [[soulspace]], and she belongs to the specific role or type of entity known as a Blood [[Shadow]]. Other individuals also possess this power, such as [[Kahn Mala]], who commands a Blood [[Shadow]] shaped like a cobra.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blood Shadow]] is a technique that can manifest with independence.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] can use her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Blood Shadow]] is a power held by [[Yan Shoumei]] that represents the majority of her power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blood Shadow]] is a type of entity or role that [[Crusher]] belongs to.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has a [[Blood Shadow]] nestled in her [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] has a [[Blood Shadow]] in the shape of a cobra.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Her Blood Shadow has awakened,” Cassias reported to Eithan.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“To feed their master,” Bai Rou responded<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“If you''d like a quick upgrade to your Blood Shadow, there'll be no opportunity like this one.”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“And with the Blood Shadow?” the Winter Sage pointed out. “You’d be lucky to survive the year.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
